description: IPC-to-BNS Mapping. A structured lookup that relates a repealed IPC section number to its current BNS equivalent. Used only to recognise old numbers on input and to annotate answers; NEVER a Source of Truth and never embedded into the vector store. Sourced from the official correspondence chart.
source: Official IPC-BNS correspondence chart (Ministry of Home Affairs)
